title: coreocarpus shrevei var. typicus
intro: Coreocarpus shrevei var. typicus is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is also known as Shreve's coreocarpus or desert coreocarpus, and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Coreocarpus shrevei var. typicus is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
